title: Chief of Staff
summary: The Chief of Staff helps turn founder direction into clear priorities, prepared decisions, and focused execution.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role supports the founder by organizing priorities, preparing decisions, and keeping executive movement focused and realistic.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Turn founder direction into structured action, protect focus, and help the company move in the right order.
